title: OpenAI announces enterprise controls for ChatGPT teams
content: OpenAI announced new enterprise controls for ChatGPT teams, including admin policy tools, audit logs, and expanded data residency options for global customers.

title: Anthropic expands cloud partnership for Claude deployments
content: Anthropic expanded its cloud partnership to make Claude available to more enterprise customers. The collaboration includes joint go-to-market support and new integration templates.

title: Google DeepMind hires former enterprise AI sales leader
content: Google DeepMind appointed a former enterprise AI sales leader to accelerate Gemini adoption with regulated-industry customers.
